thread.title: Maharashtra elections 2024: Shiv Sena big in Konkan, Ajit Pawar wrests West, BJP Shines all over
thread.title_full: Maharashtra elections 2024: Shiv Sena big in Konkan, Ajit Pawar wrests West, BJP Shines all over

author: Team mid-day
title: Maharashtra elections 2024: Shiv Sena big in Konkan, Ajit Pawar wrests West, BJP Shines all over
text: Amshya Fulji Padvi (Shiv Sena), Akkalkuwa Rajesh Udesing Padvi (BJP), Shahada Dr. Vijaykumar Krushanrao Gavit (BJP), Nandurbar Shirishkumar Surupsing Naik (Cong.), Nawapur Manjula Tulshiram Gavit (Shiv Sena), Sakri Raghavendra (Ramdada) Manohar Patil (BJP), Dhule Rural Agrawal Anupbhaiyya Omprakash (BJP), Dhule City BJP workers celebrate the partys resound victory at the Nariman Point office on Saturday. Pics/Atul Kamble Jaykumar Jitendrasinh Rawal (BJP), Sindkheda Kashiram Vechan Pawara (BJP), Shirpur Chandrakant Baliram Sonawane (Shiv Sena), Chopda Amol Haribhau Jawale (BJP), Raver Savkare Sanjay
